summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for mixed shard 84. No shared canonical is selected. Security-sensitive hydrated refs are routed to central security handling; ordinary PRs are kept open or escalated only where maintainer acceptance is the unresolved blocker. No GitHub mutation is planned directly by the worker.
